$meta.name: English (UK)
$meta.note: Source-of-truth catalogue. Every other locale falls back to these keys.

empty.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search or filters.
empty.noDataHint: Items you create will appear here.
empty.errorHint: Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support.

settings.languageHint: Choose the language and regional formatting used across Propvora.

marketing.heroTitle: Run every property operation with clarity.
marketing.heroSubtitle: The UK property platform that tracks every compliance deadline and plans your portfolio — not just stores it. Portfolio, work, money, people and a live compliance engine, in one workspace.
marketing.compTitle: Never miss a certificate, inspection or renewal again.
marketing.compBody: Propvora turns UK compliance into a living workflow: every requirement becomes a tracked deadline, a task and an evidence record — surfaced early, linked to the right property, owner and tenancy.
marketing.compChain1Sub: Gas, EICR, EPC, HMO, RRA 2026 and more — by jurisdiction.
marketing.compChain2Sub: Renewals surfaced before they expire, assigned and scheduled.
marketing.compChain3Sub: Certificates stored, versioned and audit-ready for owners.
marketing.capTitle: The operational layer your portfolio was missing.
marketing.capBody: Every capability is linked to the same properties, people and workflow history, reducing duplicated admin and disconnected records.
marketing.pfTitle: See the whole picture. Act on the detail.
marketing.pfBody: Move from portfolio overview to a property, unit, tenancy, invoice or work item without losing context.
marketing.coBody: Copilot can summarise portfolio context and prepare draft actions. You remain responsible for review and approval.
marketing.ctaBannerTitle: Bring the operation into one place.
marketing.ctaBannerBody: Start with your current portfolio and explore Propvora with a 7-day trial.
marketing.cap1Copy: Properties, units, tenancies, contacts and documents in one structured workspace.
marketing.cap2Copy: Tasks, jobs, suppliers and planned maintenance connected to the right property.
marketing.cap3Copy: Certificates, inspections, evidence, renewals and risk surfaced before deadlines.
marketing.cap4Copy: Income, expenses, invoices, arrears and deposits alongside day-to-day operations.
marketing.cap5Copy: Work, compliance, tenancy and portfolio events in a single schedule.
marketing.cap6Copy: Summaries and draft actions stay under human control before anything is sent or changed.
marketing.featHeroTitle: One workspace for the full property operation.
marketing.featHeroSubtitle: Nine modules, one connected workspace. Explore the real product surfaces used by property operators every day.
marketing.featCtaTitle: Explore it with your own workflow.
marketing.featCtaSubtitle: Start a 7-day trial or take the guided walkthrough.
marketing.footerTagline: The command centre for serious property operators. Portfolio, work, planning, contacts and money — all in one premium platform.
marketing.pricingBadge: 7-day free trial · No credit card required
marketing.pricingHeroSubtitle: One price. Everything included for your plan. No hidden fees, no per-property charges.
marketing.pricingAllPlans: All plans include a 7-day free trial · No credit card required · Cancel anytime
marketing.pricingAddonsSubtitle: Extend any plan with optional modules. Add what you need, when you need it.
marketing.pricingEnterpriseSubtitle: Running a large portfolio, a property management company, or an agency? We offer custom plans with volume pricing, dedicated support, custom integrations, and SLA agreements.
marketing.pricingCompareSubtitle: A full breakdown of what's included on each plan.
marketing.feat1Copy: Move from portfolio to property, unit and tenancy without losing the financial, compliance or activity context around it.
marketing.feat2Copy: Prioritise jobs, recurring maintenance, suppliers, schedules and conversations in one operating flow.
marketing.feat3Title: See the financial position behind the operation.
marketing.feat3Copy: Income, expenses and invoices stay connected to the records and work that created them.
marketing.feat4Title: Make obligations visible before they become urgent.
marketing.feat4Copy: Track evidence, renewal dates, ownership and status across the portfolio.
marketing.feat4P2: Evidence linked to the right asset
marketing.feat5Title: Repeatable workflows, with review built in.
marketing.feat5Copy: Use Canvas Lite to prepare and coordinate recurring operational steps while keeping material actions under human control.
marketing.feat6Title: Keep legal work connected to the case record.
marketing.feat6Copy: Organise notices, evidence, milestones and next steps without presenting workflow support as legal advice.
marketing.feat7Title: A focused workspace for every participant.
marketing.feat7Copy: Landlords, tenants and suppliers receive the information and actions relevant to them, using the same coherent Propvora interface.
